title: Diagnostic Gateway
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Complete the Value Builder diagnostic so Trinity can generate your report, recommendations, and a personalised starting point and module path.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Gather key financial and operational documents

title: Financial
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Build the financial foundation for the rest of the program. Give the owner clarity on performance, surface margin leaks and pricing issues, and set a simple financial rhythm.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Load financials into Trinity (P&L, balance sheet, revenue) or connect Xero
PLACEHOLDER: Generate the Financial Health Summary via the AI tool
PLACEHOLDER: Run the Pricing Review prompt
PLACEHOLDER: Note 3 to 5 improvement levers to explore

title: Strategy & Planning
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Carry the owner's own leadership and vision into a clear, actionable strategic plan.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Review the owner's vision and priorities for the business

title: Leadership & Communications
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Strengthen how the owner leads and communicates through the business.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Review current leadership communication rhythms

title: People
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Build a people module that works whether or not the owner has a team.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Review current team structure, if any

title: Systems & Processes
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Document and improve the systems and processes that keep the business running.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: List the business's core operating processes

title: Technology
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Assess the business's technology stack and identify improvement opportunities.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: List the current technology stack

title: Sales & Marketing
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Sharpen the business's sales and marketing engine.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Review current sales pipeline and marketing channels

title: Brand, IP & Competitive Advantage
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Clarify what makes the business defensible and differentiated.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: List brand and IP assets

title: Owner Independence
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Reduce owner dependency so the business can run without the owner in the room.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: List tasks only the owner currently does

title: Value & Growth
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Focus on the retention, concentration, and recurring-revenue drivers of business value and growth.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Review customer concentration and revenue quality

title: Risk, Legal, Compliance & Property
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Identify and reduce legal, compliance, and property-related risk.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Review key contracts, leases, and compliance obligations

title: Re-Diagnostic Capstone
purpose: PLACEHOLDER: Re-run the diagnostic, see the value movement since the last one, and get routed back through the module library with a refreshed focus.

preparation_checklist.text: PLACEHOLDER: Review progress made across the modules since the last diagnostic
